rationale: The citing paper is a methodological comparison of cross-sectional vs. longitudinal survey validity (CMV/causal inference) using collaborative NPD panel data and simulations, whereas the cited paper is a domain-specific CRM process–performance study based on cross-sectional SBU surveys. In the provided evidence, there is no indication that the CRM paper supplies a core method, mechanism, benchmark, or dataset for the citing study (only a bare DOI match), so this looks like an incidental/background citation.
